app.title: Optimal Resume
app.tagline: Optimize, analyze gaps, and format beautifully

upload.subtitle: Provide your resume and the job description
upload.jobPlaceholder: Paste the full job description here...
upload.clickToUpload: Click to upload PDF, Word, or Text file
upload.extractingTime: This usually takes 5-10 seconds for PDFs

optimize.title: Optimizing Resume...
optimize.lowScoreRecommendation: Your match score is on the low side. Try "Get Suggestions" to refine wording or "Find Missing Skills" to fill gaps from the job description.

export.tip: 💡 **Tip:** Use "Print / PDF" and choose "Save as PDF" in the print dialog.

profile.title: Career Profile
profile.description: Your complete career record. Describe every job, project, decision, and course in full detail, even things that would never fit on a one-page resume. When you optimize for a job, the AI selects only what is relevant.
profile.useProfileHint: Your full career record; the AI picks what fits this job best.
profile.usingProfile: Using your Career Profile as the resume source
profile.usingProfileHint: The AI will select the most relevant content for this job.
profile.saveError: Could not save your career profile. Please try again.
profile.loadError: Could not load your career profile. Please try again.
profile.tooLong: Your profile is too long; please shorten it before saving.
profile.importHint: PDF, DOCX or TXT — fills the sections below; nothing you typed is overwritten.
profile.importError: Could not import the resume. Please try again or fill the profile manually.

dictation.title: Dictate your experience
dictation.hint: Talk freely about what you have done: projects, decisions, results, courses. Then add it as notes, or let the AI sort it into the sections below.
dictation.placeholder: Your narration appears here as you speak. You can edit it before adding it to your profile.
dictation.classified: Classified into the sections below — review and save.
dictation.addedToNotes: Added to the Other section below — review and save.
dictation.classifyError: Could not classify the narration. You can still add it to Other as-is.
dictation.micDenied: Microphone access was denied. Allow it in your browser to dictate.
dictation.unsupported: Your browser does not support speech recognition. You can still type in the box below.

editor.name: Full name
editor.summaryHint: Who you are professionally, in a few sentences.
editor.experienceHint: For each job, describe every project in FULL detail: the problem, the decisions you made, tools used, results, numbers. The more context, the better the AI can build your case.
editor.experienceDetails: Projects, decisions, tools, results, numbers — everything, in full detail...
editor.personalProjectsHint: Side projects, open source, freelance work — with the same full detail as your jobs.
editor.projectDetails: What you built, why, the stack, decisions, outcomes...
editor.coursesHint: Include everything — even small online courses. Not all of it goes in a final resume, but it gives useful context.
editor.notesHint: Volunteering, languages, publications, awards, anything else worth knowing.

applications.saveDescription: Store this resume and job description so you can look up exactly what you sent to each company.
applications.saveError: Could not save the application. Please try again.
applications.empty: No saved applications yet. After optimizing a resume, use "Save Application" to keep a record of what you sent to each company.

addSkill.title: Add Missing Skill to Resume
addSkill.selectExperience: Select which experience to add this to:
addSkill.editNote: You can edit this before adding

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.message: Your account has been upgraded. You can now use your additional resume optimizations.
success.processingMessage: Please wait while we confirm your purchase.

canceled.title: Payment Canceled
canceled.message: Your payment was canceled. No charges have been made to your account.

footer.title: Resume Optimizer
footer.description: AI-powered resume optimization platform by Control BIA LLC. Transform your resume with intelligent suggestions and professional templates.
footer.disclaimer: Resume Optimizer provides AI-generated suggestions. Review all content before use. We do not guarantee employment outcomes. See Terms of Service for details.

essential.title: Essential Cookies
essential.description: Required for authentication, security, and core functionality. Cannot be disabled.

analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
analytics.description: Help us understand how you use the app to improve performance and user experience.

preference.title: Preference Cookies
preference.description: Remember your settings and preferences for a personalized experience.

banner.title: We use cookies
banner.message: We use essential cookies for authentication and optional cookies to improve your experience. You can customize your preferences or accept all. See our

referral.title: Refer Friends & Earn Bonus Credits
referral.description: Share your referral link! Every 5 friends who sign up earns you 5 bonus optimizations. Your friends get 1 bonus optimization when they join!

progress.title: Progress to next reward
progress.remaining: {{count}} more {{type}} until you earn 5 bonus credits!

hero.headline: Tailor your resume to any job in minutes, using only skills you actually have.
hero.subtext: AI tools make things up. This one only uses experience you have actually lived.

jobDescription.label: Job Description
jobDescription.placeholder: Paste the full job description here...

benefits.realSkills: Only your real skills and experience
